description_text: Product Description Universal 2x Glossy Black Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitter Canard Protector Description: 100% Brand New and High Quality Make your car more aggressive Highly recommended professional installation Comes with 2 rear lip wraps Please measure your back lip wrap angle and make sure these spoilers fit Custom fit for most vehicles, products may need to be drilled and bolted to the bumper ''Please Measure Your Car Rear Bumper Angle And Make Sure These Splitters will Fit Your Vehicle.'' Specification: Material: ABS Color: Glossy Black Size: As picture Package Contents: 1 pair of rear bumper + Some screws Payment Shipping Returns Contact Us Payment should be completed within 4 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.
